title: Dehradun、Uttarakhand — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Dehradun、Uttarakhand的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Dehradun是Uttarakhand的一个城市，人口约800,000。The capital of Uttarakhand, a scenic valley city at the foothills of the Himalayas, known for its boarding schools and natural beauty.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
